== sinfo unique partitions ==

debug
gpu
gpu-debug
highmem
profiling
shared*
standard

wide

== sinfo -o (P/A/L/D/T) ==
PARTITION AVAIL TIMELIMIT NODES STATE

wholenode up infinite 1 comp*

wholenode up infinite 7 down*

debug up infinite 15 mix
debug up infinite 1 alloc

gpu up infinite 1 drain
gpu up infinite 1 resv
gpu up infinite 1 alloc

ai up infinite 1 down*

ai up infinite 2 resv
ai up infinite 2 alloc
gpu-debug up infinite 13 mix-
gpu-debug up infinite 1 drain
gpu-debug up infinite 1 resv
gpu-debug up infinite 1 alloc
profiling up infinite 4 alloc

== partition details (scontrol) ==
--- debug ---
PartitionName=debug
   AllowGroups=ALL AllowAccounts=ALL DenyQos=wangwl-long,dmachi,array-submission,mojtaba,shared-50,node-10,node-1,gpu
   AllocNodes=ALL Default=NO QoS=part-debug
   DefaultTime=00:15:00 DisableRootJobs=NO ExclusiveUser=NO ExclusiveTopo=NO GraceTime=0 Hidden=NO
   MaxNodes=UNLIMITED MaxTime=UNLIMITED MinNodes=0 LLN=NO MaxCPUsPerNode=128 MaxCPUsPerSocket=UNLIMITED
   Nodes=a[000-016]
   PriorityJobFactor=1 PriorityTier=1 RootOnly=NO ReqResv=NO OverSubscribe=NO
   OverTimeLimit=NONE PreemptMode=CANCEL
   State=UP TotalCPUs=2176 TotalNodes=17 SelectTypeParameters=NONE
   JobDefaults=(null)
   DefMemPerCPU=1896 MaxMemPerNode=UNLIMITED
   TRES=cpu=2176,mem=4375800M,node=17,billing=2176
   TRESBillingWeights=CPU=1.0
   ResumeTimeout=GLOBAL SuspendTimeout=GLOBAL SuspendTime=GLOBAL PowerDownOnIdle=NO
